productName: Zen Hash Rosin - Dulce De Boof - 1g
description: Double-refined hybrid hash rosin from Dulce De Boof — washed, sifted, and cold-pressed with zero solvents, sitting right at the peak of the solventless pyramid. Smooth, potent, and terp-heavy — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, leading into a balanced head-and-body experience.
